Sport|Olympics

Braziland theUSAwill meet in the Olympic football final at the Stade de France tonight.

Both sides are going for glory at the2024 Olympicsas Emma Hayes looks to deliver theUSWNTtheir firstOlympic Gamesgold since 2012.

The Brazilians, meanwhile, are going for their very first Olympic gold.

Here’s everything you need to know about where to watch the game.

Brazil vs USA is scheduled to get underway at 4pm BST at the Stade de France, Paris.

TV channel and live stream:In the UK, there should be updates from the match on the BBC and Eurosport.

You can watch it in full live online via the Discovery+ Paris 2024 app and website.

Live blog:Follow Day 14 at the Olympics live withStandard Sport’srolling blog, featuring analysis from reporters Matt Majendie and Malik Ouzia in Paris.

author: Jonathan Gorrie
